heroTitleEm: AI makes me 10× faster at it.
heroSubtitle: Senior designer for agencies and teams. From identity to working prototype — with AI woven through the entire process, not bolted on.

steps.title: Design
steps.description: Brand & product design, rapid AI-assisted iteration.

ctaTitle: Have a project in mind? Let's talk.

faq.question: How does a project typically start?
faq.answer: With a short call to understand the problem, then a scoped proposal. Work moves through the same three stages as my process: understand, design, build — usually with a working prototype before final visual polish.

faq.question: Do you design and build, or hand off Figma files?
faq.answer: Both, depending on the project. I design in Figma and hand-code the front end myself when it matters — most of this site's CSS is written by hand, not generated. For larger teams I can also hand off clean, documented files.

faq.question: Do you work with teams outside the Czech Republic?
faq.answer: Yes, most of my clients are outside the Czech Republic. I keep a few hours of overlap with US and Western European time zones for calls and async the rest.

faq.question: How do you use AI in your process?
faq.answer: As an accelerant for research, iteration, and prototyping — not as a replacement for design decisions. Every direction still gets judged and refined by hand before it ships.

faq.question: What kind of projects do you specialize in?
faq.answer: Hospitality and subscription products — booking flows, member dashboards, and the brand and product design work around them.

faq.question: Are you available for new work?
faq.answer: Availability varies — email me and I'll tell you honestly whether the timing works.
